title: Precedent Record
description: Schema for precedent cases referenced in studies and decisions.

schema_version.description: Version of the precedent schema used to validate this record.

case_id.description: Stable identifier for the precedent case.

description.description: Summary of the case and context.

decision.description: Outcome or disposition of the case.

source_document.description: Document or docket where the decision is recorded.

source_location.description: Section, paragraph, or citation for the decision.

review_status.description: Human review status of the record.

provenance.description: Provenance record capturing lineage and validation details.
